result.stdout:
.NET Core console app to update a database using EF migrations.

Usage: DbUpdater [options]

Options:
  -?|-h|--help                        Show help information
  -c|--connection <ConnectionString>  The database connection string (required)
  -a|--assembly <assemblyfile>        The assemlby file containing the dbcontext creator (required)
  --nomigrate                         Do not actually migrate
  -f|--fullsql                        Whether to dump full sql script file
  -d|--deltasql                       Whether to dump delta sql script files
  -p|--path <PATH>                    The location to store script files, defaults to current folder
  -i|--idempotent                     generate idempotent script files
  -hs|--historyschema <schema>        The schema for the history table (defaults to dbo).
  -h|--history <tablename>            The tablename for migration history (defaults to _SchemaHistory)
This tool requires the connection string option (use quotes around it when it has spaces) and the assembly option. It will migrate
the database (including creation) by default. You can optionally disable migration and/or use sql script generation options
